name: Glif MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Glif MCP server enabling AI agents to run Glif workflows — community-shared AI automation pipelines combining image generation, text processing, and other AI tools — providing access to thousands of user-created and curated AI workflows through a single MCP interface.
use_cases: Running community AI image generation workflows from creative agents
Accessing specialized AI tools via pre-built Glif workflows from automation agents
Generating content with multi-step AI pipelines from content agents
Using no-code AI workflow compositions from non-developer agents
Accessing niche AI capabilities via community-built Glifs from research agents
Rapid AI prototyping using existing Glif workflows from development agents
not_for: Teams needing proprietary or private AI workflows
High-volume production use (Glif is community platform with rate limits)
Teams needing full control over AI pipeline internals
best_when: An agent needs to run a specific AI workflow that someone has already built on Glif — accessing the community's collection of AI pipelines without building from scratch.
avoid_when: You need predictable, high-volume AI processing — Glif is a community platform with shared resources.

auth.notes: Glif API token required. Obtain from glif.app account settings. Free tier available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited runs per day
pricing.notes: Official MCP from glifxyz org. Free tier available. Paid plans for higher usage.

performance.rate_limits: Tier-dependent; free tier has daily run limits

known_agent_gotchas: Community Glif workflow quality varies — some are excellent, others are poorly maintained
Workflow IDs change if creator modifies or deletes the Glif
Long-running image generation workflows can time out
Free tier run limits can be hit quickly in agent loops
Output URLs may expire — download assets immediately
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Glif API token. Official MCP. Community workflows — content quality varies. Data sent to Glif servers.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API token. Official MCP. Data to Glif servers.
